title: IIT Roorkee Notification 2026 - Apply for Project Fellow Posts
description: The Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Fellow Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the M.E/ M.Tech, Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the IIT Roorkee Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by the last date for applications. If ...
